frontmatter.title: Hello World! My name is
frontmatter.name: Danyal Ali Asghar
frontmatter.subtitle: I build scalable AI and data systems.

node.html: Senior AI Engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable AI, data, and cloud systems. Hands-on experience with LLM-based extraction, RAG-style retrieval, prompt engineering, Azure AI services, and production automation. Strong in Python, SQL, cloud architecture, and end-to-end AI system delivery.

skills.AI / GenAI / LLMs: OpenAI GPT, Azure OpenAI, Azure Mistral OCR, Whisper STT, Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, LlamaIndex, prompt engineering, RAG workflows, LLM-based extraction, AI workflow automation

skills.Machine Learning / NLP: scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, pandas, NumPy, model evaluation, feature engineering, data validation

skills.Databases / Vector Stores: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redshift, BigQuery, Pinecone, FAISS, Weaviate

skills.Data Engineering / Orchestration: dbt, Airflow, ETL/ELT pipelines, analytics modeling, data quality checks, pipeline monitoring

skills.Web / Backend: FastAPI, Flask, Django, RESTful APIs, WebSockets, gRPC, ReactJS, JavaScript, HTML, CSS

skills.Cloud / DevOps: Azure, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Blob Storage, Cosmos DB, cloud deployment

node.html:
With 7+ years of experience in AI engineering, I build production-ready systems that combine machine learning, large language models, and cloud-native data platforms. My work spans end-to-end AI solutions, from document and semantic search to OCR-powered extraction, voice assistants, RAG workflows, and automated analytics pipelines.

I have a strong background in designing scalable inference and data orchestration workflows, integrating AI into web and backend services, and delivering reliable results with Azure and AWS. I also focus on model evaluation, feature engineering, and operational quality checks to ensure solutions are robust and production-ready.

I enjoy turning complex data into practical, automated intelligence and helping teams adopt modern AI patterns with clarity and confidence.

• Architected an AI-powered lease abstraction platform for life sciences REITs, reducing manual review and accelerating acquisition and asset management workflows.
  • Designed and implemented a multi-parser pipeline (PDFPlumber, Azure Mistral OCR) with dynamic heading extraction to handle diverse lease formats from biotech and pharma tenants.
  • Integrated Azure Mistral and OpenAI for structured extraction, mapping, and metadata, improving abstraction speed and consistency for commercial lease review.
  • Designed scalable Azure-based storage (Blob + Cosmos DB) with multi-tenant isolation and folder conventions for scanned and processed documents.
  • Implemented streaming uploads, progress reporting, and timing metrics across parsing and abstraction to improve performance monitoring and user feedback.
  • Improved reliability with error handling and graceful degradation for non-critical steps in the lease processing pipeline.
  • Built NLP pipelines and prompt engineering workflows using OpenAI and Azure Mistral for document understanding and metadata extraction.
  • Built a voice assistant prototype using Whisper and GPT for speech-to-text and conversational AI.
  • Designed data validation and monitoring pipelines for AI systems to ensure reliability and performance.
  • Tech Stack: Python, Azure OpenAI, Azure Mistral OCR, Blob Storage, Cosmos DB, PDFPlumber, Whisper, GPT-4, FastAPI.

• Built a voice assistant prototype using Whisper STT and GPT-4 for conversational response generation.
  • Developed prompt templates and LLM workflows to improve response quality and latency.
  • Built APIs and cloud-native services for AI feature integration.
  • Designed data validation, monitoring, and automation pipelines in Python.
  • Designed and optimized end-to-end ELT pipelines to process multi-source data using Python, SQL, and Airflow/dbt workflows.
  • Orchestrated data pipelines using Apache Airflow and automated transformations using dbt for modular, testable data flows.
  • Built scalable data models and warehouse schemas in Redshift and PostgreSQL to support analytics dashboards and ad-hoc BI reporting.
  • Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, Airflow, dbt, PostgreSQL, Redshift, Whisper, GPT-4, AWS, Azure, Git.

• Developed modules and JS applications with ReactJS.
  • Developed, debugged, and tested back-end APIs.
  • Experience in using modern build toolchains and package managers (webpack, npm, and yarn).
  • Experience developing modern responsive web applications with HTML, CSS, Material UI.
  • Experience working in agile environments with tools like Git, Bitbucket.
  • Contributed actively to daily standups, retrospectives, and sprint planning.
  • Tech Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, ReactJS, PostgreSQL, Git, Bitbucket, AWS.

• Worked with REST APIs and web scraping to extract data (Tweepy, Telethon, GoogleNewsAPI).
  • Extracted and processed textual data using APIs and web scraping for NLP analysis.
  • Conducted sentiment analysis using TextBlob and VaderSentiment to extract insights from unstructured data.
  • Performed CRUD operations in MongoDB (PyMongo).
  • Experience in using modern build toolchains and package managers (conda, pip).
  • Automated data pipelines and scripts for real-time data ingestion and processing.
  • Performed 75% code reduction in prior scripts while converting NodeJS scripts to Python.
  • Tech Stack: Python, Flask, NodeJS, Git, MongoDB, AWS.
Interactive knowledge assistant powered by LLM retrieval augmentation, embedding search, and dynamic prompt chaining for enterprise Q&A over internal documentation and policy archives.

Automated AI orchestration platform that integrates model inference, data transformation, and quality checks across ETL pipelines, delivering scheduled insights and alerts with minimal manual intervention.

AI-powered lease abstraction platform for life sciences REITs. Combines OCR, LLM extraction, and metadata mapping with Azure Blob/Cosmos DB storage, multi-tenant isolation, and streaming uploads for commercial lease review.
Multimodal search system combining text, audio, and OCR-extracted content into a single semantic index for rapid search and analysis across documents, recordings, and scanned reports.

frontmatter.title: Document Chatbot with Azure AI Search

node.html: Retrieval-based document Q&A system that indexes Blob Storage documents in Azure AI Search, enabling natural language queries over unstructured content with RAG-style retrieval.
Conversational voice assistant prototype using Whisper for speech-to-text and GPT-4 for natural language response generation, with prompt templates tuned for quality and latency.

node.html: My inbox is always open. Whether you have a question or just want to say hello, I'll try my best to get back to you! Feel free to mail me about any relevant job updates.
